arts.ttl: Five-name list: Liverpool & Man Utd stars among Barcelona’s top summer transfer targets
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly have five wingers on their list of transfer targets this summer, including big names at Liverpool and Manchester United. The Catalan giants have a world class pair of attacking players in that area of their squad already with Raphinha and Lamine Yamal, but it seems they want another major addition ahead of next […] The post Five-name list: Liverpool & Man Utd stars among Barcelona’s top summer transfer targets appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: ‘Specifically Aston Villa’ – Emery has his eye on new striker, deal seen as good for everyone
arts.sum: Aston Villa are eyeing a move for Porto striker Samu Omorodion as they seek out a replacement for Jhon Duran. That’s according to AS, who report that the striker is back on Aston Villa’s list after being linked with a move in the summer transfer window.
